examples: He was branded an unfeeling bully.
The media has made unfeeling voyeurs of all of us.
Here the unfeeling Toad broke into a snigger, and then pulled himself together and tried to look particularly solemn.
Criticisms that she was cold and unfeeling about her roommate's murder are unfair, she said.
So bolting MTs into their games is simply seen in cold and unfeeling bottom line focused numbers.
